couponItems.name: 20% Off Your Entire Bill
couponItems.description: Enjoy a delicious Italian meal in the heart of Greenwich Village with 20% off your total bill.
couponItems.terms: Offer valid for up to 4 guests. Cannot be combined with other offers. Not valid on holidays. Gratuity not included.

reviews.author: Jessica
reviews.comment: The pasta was incredible! This coupon made it a great deal.

couponItems.name: Free Appetizer with Entree Purchase
couponItems.description: Get a free order of our famous 'Liberty Fries' with the purchase of any two entrees.
couponItems.terms: Limit one free appetizer per table. Must purchase two full-priced entrees. Dine-in only.

reviews.author: Mike
reviews.comment: Best burgers in town, and the free fries were a bonus!

couponItems.name: Buy One, Get One Free Ticket
couponItems.description: Experience the magic of Broadway! Buy one ticket for 'The Silicon Heart: The Musical' and get a second one free.
couponItems.terms: Offer valid for mezzanine seats on Tuesday-Thursday performances only. Subject to availability.

couponItems.name: $15 Off Admission
couponItems.description: Get $15 off your all-day pass to the top of the iconic Empire State Building for breathtaking 360° views.
couponItems.terms: Valid for standard adult admission only. Not valid for express pass or special events.

reviews.author: Sarah
reviews.comment: The views are absolutely worth it. The coupon was easy to use.

couponItems.name: 15% Off Harbor Lights Cruise
couponItems.description: See the NYC skyline and Statue of Liberty sparkle at night on this relaxing 2-hour cruise.
couponItems.terms: Must book online using promo code provided. Valid for the 7:00 PM Harbor Lights cruise only.

couponItems.name: Free Tote Bag with $100 Purchase
couponItems.description: Get an exclusive 'I ❤️ NYC' designer tote bag when you spend $100 or more at this iconic 5th Avenue department store.
couponItems.terms: Purchase must be made in a single transaction. Excludes cosmetics and furniture. While supplies last.
